comments: Approved. I reviewed tasks/v0.5-m2-result-review-packet.json, tasks/v0.5-m2-execution-result.json, tasks/v0.5-m2-execution-contract.json, and verified git diff HEAD. The execution changes are limited to src/mcp-server/src/index.ts, matching both changed_files and allowed_files. The implementation adds verify_execution_compliance, accepts baseline_commit and contract_path, reads the contract allowed_files, runs git diff --name-only against the baseline, and returns compliant/changed_files/uncontracted_files/drift_detected output. The added logic is read-only (fs.readFile plus git diff only) and I found no workflow mutation, auto-approval logic, reviewer identity redesign, or protocol evolution content in the diff.
